title: Twisted Tales: Warped Reality
description: Twisted Tales: Warped Reality is a work in progress RPG styled modpack. Build a town, level up, and take on the end. Go farther than that if you think you can too!
body:
# Twisted Tales: Warped Reality
## What is this modpack about?
Twisted Tales: Warped Reality is a modpack aimed at giving the player a new and refreshing feel to Minecraft RPGs. Explore the wonderous lands created by Tectonic and Regions Unexplored, build your own town using Minecolonies, or become the unique character of your dreams using Origins, Origins Classes, Just Leveling, and many of the available charms and trinkets
## What can I expect from this modpack?
You can expect many major updates from this pack. Many updates may even feel like a completely different modpack. This pack is currently still in an Alpha/Playtest stage and is not very stable. Our main priorities moving forward are thinning the pack down and making each of the mods that we keep better intergrated with each other
## What are some some major mods in this pack?
- Sinytra Connector(Helps us run the best of Forge and Fabric)
- Better Combat
- Cardiac
- Configurable Death
- Create
- Creeper/Enderman Overhaul
- Dungeons and Taverns
- End Remastered
- Extra Alchemy
- Geologic Expansion
- Just Leveling
- RPG Series Mods
- Minecolonies
- Origins/Origins Classes and addons
- Parcool!
- Regions Unexplored
- Spelunkery
- Tectonic
- Trinkets
- True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul
- When Dungeons Arise
- YUNG's Series
- [Let's Do] Series
### Known Issues
- Included Packet Fixer may not always fix packet issues when pack is used on servers
- Some structures cause performance issues(i.e. WDA-Mechanical Nest)
- Origins with ability to fly may also impact performance
- Sometimes items don't drop on death
- Sometimes the game crashes on death
- Stellarity Spell-Book of Updraft can cause a secondary bounce that causes lethal damage
### FAQ & Plans for the pack in the future
Q: What is the plan for the pack in the future?
A: We want to build a proper story that would allow the player to choose how to advance in the story, helping to keep in line with the "player makes the story" theme

Q: Where can I make suggestions for the pack?
A: The best place to put suggestions for the pack is in the TTWR section in the included Discord.

Q: Where do I report an issue with the pack?
A: There is another section in the same Discord for reports in the pack
